diff --git a/memory/operator/shared/current-focus.md b/memory/operator/shared/current-focus.md

 # Current Focus

diff --git a/runtime/operator_runtime.py b/runtime/operator_runtime.py
index a61f775..3a95c3f 100644
--- a/runtime/operator_runtime.py
+++ b/runtime/operator_runtime.py
@@ -128,6 +128,13 @@ def validate_task(task: dict) -> list:
     if errors:
         return errors
 
+    requires_approval = task.get("requires_approval")
+    if not isinstance(requires_approval, bool):
+        errors.append(
+            "requires_approval must be true or false, "
+            f"got: {requires_approval!r}"
+        )
+
     tier = task.get("tier", 99)
     if not isinstance(tier, int) or tier < 0 or tier > 7:
         errors.append(f"tier must be 0-7, got: {tier}")
@@ -267,6 +274,17 @@ def process_task(path: Path):
         write_audit_record(created_by, "validation_failed", "; ".join(errors), task_id)
         return
 
+    # Explicit approval gate
+    if task.get("requires_approval") is True:
+        print("  APPROVAL REQUIRED: requires_approval=true — leaving in inbox")
+        write_audit_record(
+            created_by,
+            "awaiting_approval",
+            "requires_approval=true",
+            task_id,
+        )
+        return
+
     # Tier routing
     if tier not in AUTO_EXECUTE_TIERS:
         print(f"  TIER {tier}: requires approval — leaving in inbox for Jose/Claude")
DONE_1926
